rulings.Case Title: ADA SORTO ET AL VS. WEDGEWOOD, INC. ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Motion For Denial Of Application For Determination Of Good Faith Settlement
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, April 21, 2017, line 3. DEFENDANTs EAGLE VISTA EQUITIES LLC, GREEN APPLE PROPERTIES III, LLC, WEDGEWOOD (ERRONEOUSLY SUED AS "WEDGEWOOD, INC.")'s Motion For Denial Of Application For Determination Of Good Faith Settlement GRANTED. Application for Good Faith Settlement is denied. Settling parties fail to sustain their initial burden. While settling parties acknowledge Tech-Built factors (e.g. a rough approximation of plaintiff's total recovery) no information/evidence is provided. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: DYNASTY PROPERTIES, LLC, VS. JEFFREY KWONG ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Quash Deposition Subpoena For Production Of Business Records Of Defendant Jeffrey Kwong Served On Witness Deponent Custodian Of Records Sf Unified School District; Motion For Protective Order Limiting Discovery; Memo Of Points And Authorities; Declaration Of Defendant Jeffrey Kwong; Request For Monetary Sanctions Against Plaintiff And Plaintiff'S Attorney In Sum Of $1000.
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, April 21, 2017, line 5. DEFENDANT JEFFREY KWONG's Motion To Quash Deposition Subpoena For Production Of Business Records Of Defendant Jeffrey Kwong Served On Witness Deponent Custodian Of Records Sf Unified School District; Motion For Protective Order Limiting Discovery; Memo Of Points And Authorities; Declaration Of Defendant Jeffrey Kwong; Request For Monetary Sanctions Against Plaintiff And Plaintiff'S Attorney In Sum Of $1000. Motion to Quash is moot, records have been produced by the deponent. Motion for Protective order is granted as follows: no information contained in the records obtained from the deponent, except for Defendant Jeffrey Kwong residential address, may be used in this or other actions. Information shall be "attorney's eyes only." All documents not containing Jeffrey Kwong residential address information shall be safely disposed of (professional confidential shredding) and all documents containing residential address shall be redacted leaving only the defendant's name and address, and where possible, the title of the document visible. Plaintiff's counsel to file a declaration of compliance no later than April 24, 2017 by noon; courtesy copy delivered to department 501. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: ISKRA ASTUDILLO VS. MOBALANLE ODULATE ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, April 21, 2017, line 7. DEFENDANT MOBALANLE ODULATE's DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT OVERRULED, 5 days to answer. The Court finds this demurrer based on uncertainty frivolous and without merit. The Court notes that the moving party attached to its moving papers (10 pages stapled together) an incomplete copy of the Complaint, i.e. missing page 2 of 3 containing paragraph 6(d) containing allegations (ultimate facts) sufficiently explaining and supporting Plaintiff's claim re: amount of past due rent claimed in the Notice. Plaintiff's request for sanctions granted in the amount of $2,437.50 to be paid within 10 days of notice of entry of order. = (501/REQ)
